messages.content: 写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：Family, surprise, pet, call, clever

1. Family：家庭

- My family consists of Daddy Pig, Mummy Pig, Peppa Pig, and George Pig.
- We love spending time together as a family, whether it's playing games or going on adventures.
- Sometimes our extended family comes to visit, like Granny Pig, Grandpa Pig, and Auntie Pig.

2. Surprise：惊喜

- Today is Mummy Pig's birthday, and we have a surprise party planned!
- Peppa and George are trying to keep the surprise a secret from Mummy Pig.
- When Mummy Pig walks in, we all yell, "Surprise!"

3. Pet：宠物

- Peppa and George have a pet goldfish named Goldie.
- We saw a cute little dog at the pet store today, but we didn't buy it because we already have enough pets.
- Sometimes we take Goldie to the park and let her swim in the pond.

4. Call：打电话

- Daddy Pig is trying to call someone on the phone, but he can't find it anywhere!
- Peppa is talking on the phone with her friend Suzy Sheep.
- Mummy Pig always reminds us to call her if we're going to be late coming home.

5. Clever：聪明的

- Peppa is very clever and always knows how to solve a problem.
- Daddy Pig is a clever man and knows how to fix things around the house.
- We think George is going to be very clever when he grows up, because he's always curious and asking questions.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：copy, everything, show, Tea time, hurry,

1. Copy：复制

- Peppa and George are playing with their art supplies and making copies of their favorite pictures.
- Daddy Pig needs to make copies of some important papers for work.
- We have a copy machine in the office that we use to make duplicates of documents.

2. Everything：一切，所有的东西

- Peppa loves Halloween because she gets to wear a costume and eat candy and everything!
- Daddy Pig is trying to fix the car, but he needs a wrench and he can't find it anywhere. He's looked in all the drawers and everything!
- Mummy Pig is very organized and has a place for everything in the house.

3. Show：表演，展示

- Peppa and her friends are putting on a show for their parents. They're practicing their dance moves and singing their favorite songs.
- Daddy Pig is going to a car show to look at all the new models.
- Mummy Pig took Peppa and George to a puppet show at the theater.

4. Tea time：下午茶时间

- In England, it's tradition to have a cup of tea and a small snack in the afternoon. This is called "tea time."
- Peppa and her family are having a tea party with their friends, and they're serving sandwiches, scones, and tea.
- Daddy Pig is making a pot of tea for Mummy Pig as a special surprise.

5. Hurry：赶紧，匆忙

- Peppa is running late for school and needs to hurry or she'll be late.
- Mummy Pig is in a hurry to finish cleaning the house before her guests arrive.
- Daddy Pig is hurrying to finish his work so he can spend time with his family.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：finish, noisy, leave, completely, Off you go

1. Finish：完成

- Peppa is trying to finish her homework before dinner time.
- Daddy Pig is finishing up some work on his computer.
- Mummy Pig is finishing up the laundry before she can relax for the evening.

2. Noisy：喧闹的

- Peppa and her friends are being very noisy while playing their game.
- The construction site near our house is very noisy with all the equipment and machines.
- George is being noisy while playing with his toy car.

3. Leave：离开

- Peppa and her family are leaving for their vacation tomorrow.
- Daddy Pig has to leave early for his business trip.
- Mummy Pig is telling Peppa to leave her alone so she can finish her work.

4. Completely：完全地

- Peppa is completely exhausted after a long day of playing with her friends.
- Daddy Pig is completely soaked from the rain and needs to change his clothes.
- Mummy Pig is completely finished with her craft project and is happy with how it turned out.

5. Off you go：走吧

- Daddy Pig is saying "off you go" to Peppa and George as they leave for school in the morning.
- Mummy Pig is telling Daddy Pig "off you go" as he leaves for work.
- Peppa's teacher is saying "off you go" to the students as they go out to play.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下： a little bit, shy, enjoy, pretend, my word

1. A little bit：一点点

- Peppa only wants a little bit of ice cream, so she doesn't get too full.
- Daddy Pig is only a little bit taller than Mummy Pig.
- George is a little bit scared of the dark.

2. Shy：害羞的

- Peppa's friend Suzy Sheep is very shy and doesn't like talking to new people.
- George is feeling shy today and doesn't want to play with the other kids.
- Peppa is trying to help her shy classmate come out of her shell and make new friends.

3. Enjoy：享受

- Peppa and George really enjoy spending time with their grandparents.
- Daddy Pig enjoys cooking dinner for the family.
- Mummy Pig enjoys taking long walks in the park.

4. Pretend：假装

- Peppa and her friends are playing pretend and pretending to be pirates on a ship.
- George is pretending to be a superhero and saving the world from villains.
- Daddy Pig is pretending to be a giant and chasing Peppa and George around the living room.

5. My word：我的天

- Daddy Pig says "my word" when he sees how messy the living room is.
- Mummy Pig says "my word" when she tastes Daddy Pig's cooking for the first time.
- Peppa says "my word" when she discovers a new toy at the store.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下： hide and seek, one’s turn, hide, seek, count,

1. Hide and seek：捉迷藏

- Peppa and her friends are playing hide and seek in the backyard.
- George is really good at hide and seek and always finds the best hiding spots.
- Daddy Pig enjoys playing hide and seek with the kids, but sometimes he's too big to fit in the hiding spots.

2. One's turn：轮流

- Peppa and George are taking turns playing with their new toy.
- In class, the teacher calls on each student one by one to answer questions and take turns speaking.
- Daddy Pig says it's George's turn to choose what they do today since Peppa got to choose last time.

3. Hide：躲藏

- Peppa is trying to find George, who is hiding under the bed.
- Daddy Pig is trying to hide his birthday present from Mummy Pig.
- George is hiding his toy dinosaur in his backpack so he can bring it to school without anyone seeing.

4. Seek：寻找

- In hide and seek, Peppa is seeking out her friends who are hiding.
- Daddy Pig is seeking a solution to a problem at work.
- Mummy Pig is seeking out a new hobby she can enjoy in her free time.

5. Count：数数

- Peppa is counting how many toy blocks she has.
- George is counting how many times he can jump on one foot.
- Daddy Pig is counting how many miles he's running on his morning jog.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：Ready or not, upstairs, strange, behind, curtain

1. Ready or not：准备好了没有

- Peppa is shouting "ready or not" to her friends who are playing hide and seek.
- George is hiding under the table and yelling "ready or not, here I come" to start the game.
- Daddy Pig is asking Mummy Pig if she's ready or not to leave the house and go to the store.

2. Upstairs：楼上

- Peppa and George's bedrooms are upstairs in their house.
- Daddy Pig's office is on the upstairs level of his workplace.
- Mummy Pig is telling the kids to play quietly so they don't disturb the people who live upstairs.

3. Strange：奇怪的

- Peppa thinks it's strange that her friend is wearing a hat inside on a sunny day.
- George thinks it's strange that the dog next door is barking so loudly at nothing.
- Daddy Pig thinks it's strange that he can't find his car keys anywhere.

4. Behind：在后面

- Peppa's toy is behind the couch, so she has to reach over and grab it.
- George is hiding behind the curtains so no one can see him.
- Daddy Pig's phone is ringing, but he left it behind on his desk at work.

5. Curtain：窗帘

- Peppa and George like playing peek-a-boo behind the curtains.
- Daddy Pig is trying to hang new curtains in the living room, but he's having trouble getting them straight.
- Mummy Pig is reminding the kids to be careful around the curtains so they don't accidentally pull them down.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：again, another, toy basket, newspaper, all the time

1. Again：再一次

- Peppa wants to watch her favorite episode of her show again.
- George wants to play hide and seek again because he loves the game so much.
- Daddy Pig is telling Peppa she needs to clean her room again because it's getting messy.

2. Another：另一个

- Peppa has eaten all of her ice cream and asks for another scoop.
- George is showing off his new toy and wishes he had another toy to play with.
- Daddy Pig is making another cup of coffee because he needs the caffeine boost.

3. Toy basket：玩具篮子

- Peppa and George's toy basket is overflowing with all their favorite toys.
- Daddy Pig is telling the kids to put their toys back in the basket when they're finished playing.
- Mummy Pig is organizing the toy basket and getting rid of any broken or unused toys.

4. Newspaper：报纸

- Daddy Pig likes to read the newspaper with his breakfast in the morning.
- Mummy Pig is using yesterday's newspaper to clean the windows.
- Peppa and George are making paper hats out of the newspaper and pretending to be pirates.

5. All the time：一直

- Peppa and George like to play games and have fun all the time.
- Daddy Pig is telling Mummy Pig how much he loves her all the time.
- George is asking for snacks all the time because he's always hungry.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：The Playgroup, look forward to, fine, keep him company

1. The Playgroup：幼儿园

- Peppa and George go to The Playgroup to play with their friends.
- Daddy Pig drops off the kids at The Playgroup before going to work.
- Mummy Pig volunteers at The Playgroup to help out the teachers.

2. Look forward to：期待

- Peppa is looking forward to her birthday party next week.
- George is looking forward to Christmas because he loves getting presents.
- Daddy Pig is looking forward to the weekend so he can relax and spend time with his family.

3. Fine：好的

- Peppa tells her friend that it's fine if she can't come to her party.
- George is feeling fine after falling off his scooter and getting a scrape.
- Daddy Pig is making sure everything is fine with the car before taking it on a road trip.

4. Keep him company：陪他

- Peppa is keeping George company while he's feeling unwell.
- Daddy Pig is asking Mummy Pig to keep him company during his lunch break.
- George wants to bring his toy dinosaur to keep him company on the trip to The Playgroup.

Note: 小猪佩奇中的Playgroup除了幼儿园，也可以表示儿童组织、玩耍小组。所以第一个词组翻译成幼儿园，只是其中的一种情况。
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：enough, brilliant, proud, paint, circle,

1. Enough：足够的

- Peppa has had enough ice cream and doesn't want any more.
- George is big enough to ride his bike without training wheels.
- Daddy Pig has had enough work for the day and is ready to relax at home.

2. Brilliant：棒极了，非常好

- Peppa's teacher tells her she did a brilliant job on her art project.
- George is feeling brilliant after winning the game of hide and seek.
- Daddy Pig thinks Mummy Pig's cooking is brilliant and compliments her on it.

3. Proud：自豪的

- Peppa is proud of herself for learning how to ride a bike without training wheels.
- George is proud to show off his drawing to his family.
- Daddy Pig is proud of how well Peppa and George are doing in The Playgroup.

4. Paint：涂颜料，画画

- Peppa and George are painting pictures together in the playroom.
- Daddy Pig is helping the kids paint the walls in the living room.
- Mummy Pig is teaching Peppa how to paint a still life of fruit.

5. Circle：圆圈

- Peppa and her friends are sitting in a circle playing a game.
- George is drawing circles on his paper with his crayons.
- Daddy Pig is teaching the kids how to draw perfect circles using a compass.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：petal, shape, stalk, leave, Perfect, pick up

1. Petal：花瓣

- Peppa and George are picking petals off a flower and counting them.
- Mummy Pig is showing the kids how to press and dry flower petals in a book.
- Daddy Pig is buying a bouquet of flowers with lots of colorful petals as a gift for Mummy Pig.

2. Shape：形状

- Peppa and her friends are drawing shapes like circles, squares, and triangles.
- George is using his toy blocks to build different shapes like a tower or a bridge.
- Daddy Pig is showing the kids how to use cookie cutters to make different shapes out of dough.

3. Stalk：茎

- Peppa and George are examining the different parts of a plant, like the leaves and stalk.
- Daddy Pig is trimming the stalks of the vegetables in the garden so they grow properly.
- Mummy Pig is teaching the kids how to arrange flowers in a vase by cutting their stalks at an angle.

4. Leave：离开

- Peppa and her family are about to leave for their vacation to the beach.
- Daddy Pig is telling the kids to leave him alone so he can finish his work.
- Mummy Pig is sad to see Peppa and George leave to go back to school after the summer break.

5. Perfect：完美的

- Peppa is showing off her perfect score on her test to her parents.
- George is proud of his perfect sandcastle he built at the beach.
- Daddy Pig thinks his lasagna turned out perfectly and can't wait to eat it. 

6. Pick up：捡起

- Peppa and George are racing to see who can pick up the most seashells at the beach.
- Daddy Pig is telling the kids to pick up their toys and put them in the toy basket before going to bed.
- Mummy Pig is teaching Peppa and George to pick up litter at the park and put it in the trash bin.
写出下列单词的词义，并用小猪佩奇的词汇水平，举出3个英文例句（非对话），单词如下：as long as, disturb, lap, quietly, touch

1. As long as：只要

- Peppa wants to go to the park as long as it's not raining.
- George
